parameters.query:
SELECT co.order_number, co.items, co.total_amount, co.delivery_type,
  co.delivery_address, co.customer_notes, co.confirm_token,
  co.token_expires_at, co.status,
  co.appointment_datetime,
  co.appointment_location,
  b.business_name
FROM table_1 co
JOIN table_2 b ON b.id = co.business_id
WHERE co.confirm_token = $1
  AND co.token_expires_at > now()
  AND co.status IN ('enquiry', 'placed', 'pending')

parameters.responseBody:
⚠️ Link Expired

This confirmation link has expired or has already been used.

Go back to your chat and tap Confirm & Pay again on the order notification to get a fresh link.

parameters.query:
SELECT 
  co.id, co.order_number, co.tenant_id, co.customer_chat_id,
  co.token_expires_at, co.total_amount, co.items,
  t.password_hash,
  pi.access_token AS bot_token
FROM table_1 co
JOIN table_3 t ON t.id = co.tenant_id
JOIN table_4 pi ON pi.business_id = co.business_id AND pi.platform = 'telegram'
WHERE co.confirm_token = $1
  AND co.token_expires_at > now()
  AND co.status IN ('enquiry', 'placed', 'pending')

parameters.responseBody: ={ "success": false, "message": "This link has expired or has already been used." }

parameters.query:
SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN split_part(password_hash, ':', 1) = 'sha256' THEN
      password_hash = 'sha256:' ||
        split_part(password_hash, ':', 2) || ':' ||
        encode(sha256(convert_to(
          split_part(password_hash, ':', 2) || $1,
          'UTF8'
        )), 'hex')
    ELSE false
  END AS password_ok
FROM table_3
column_1 $2::uuid

UPDATE table_1
column_2 'confirmed',
    payment_bank_name = $3,
    payment_acct_no   = $4,
    payment_acct_name = $5,
    confirm_token     = NULL,
    token_expires_at  = NULL,
    updated_at        = now()
column_1 $1::uuid
  column_3 $2::uuid
RETURNING id, order_number, customer_chat_id, total_amount,
          payment_bank_name, payment_acct_no, payment_acct_name

options.queryReplacement:
={{ [
  $('Validate Token + Fetch Order').first().json.id,
  $('Validate Token + Fetch Order').first().json.tenant_id,
  $('Webhook (POST)').first().json.body.bankName,
  $('Webhook (POST)').first().json.body.acctNo,
  $('Webhook (POST)').first().json.body.acctName
] }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { chat_id: $('Save Payment Details + Confirm Order').first().json.customer_chat_id, text: '✅ Order Confirmed! Your order ' + $('Save Payment Details + Confirm Order').first().json.order_number + ' has been confirmed 🎉 To complete your order, please make payment to: Bank: ' + $('Save Payment Details + Confirm Order').first().json.payment_bank_name + ' Account Number: ' + $('Save Payment Details + Confirm Order').first().json.payment_acct_no + ' Account Name: ' + $('Save Payment Details + Confirm Order').first().json.payment_acct_name + ' Send your receipt here once you've paid and we'll confirm it quickly. Thank you! 🙏', parse_mode: 'HTML' } }}

parameters.name: text

parameters.query:
SELECT 
  co.customer_chat_id,
  co.business_id,
  CASE 
    WHEN co.customer_chat_id LIKE '%@s.whatsapp.net' THEN 'whatsapp' 
    ELSE 'telegram' 
  END AS customer_platform,
  pi_wa.access_token AS wa_instance
FROM table_1 co
LEFT JOIN table_4 pi_wa
  ON pi_wa.business_id = co.business_id
  AND pi_wa.platform = 'whatsapp'
  AND pi_wa.is_active = true
WHERE co.id = $1::uuid
LIMIT 1
